name: site_mt
description: MTParceiros - Simulador MCMV com pipeline de segurança

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const dist = path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist'); if (fs.existsSync(dist)) fs.rmSync(dist, { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.build: npm run clean && node scripts/obfuscate.js && node scripts/sign-code.js && node scripts/copy-assets.js

author: MTParceiros
